summary: Soundboard restoration yields good overall audio (early tracks a bit fast/muddy, later tracks clear) and a hot second half featuring Easy Wind, Dire Wolf, Uncle John's Band intro and a stellar jam sequence.
review: The recording shows noticeable improvement after the cleanup – the first fifteen minutes sound a little rushed and thin, but the last ten tracks are crisp and well‑balanced. Musically the show shines with scorching renditions of Easy Wind and Dire Wolf, a killer Uncle John's Band intro, an epic The Eleven → Death Don't jam and a powerful Cryp­tical > Drums > The Other One > Cryptical sequence.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (many standout songs) outweighs modest recording inconsistencies in the early portion, resulting in a solid overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Early tracks sound fast and a bit muddy; later tracks are clean after restoration. Overall listening experience is good thanks to the cleanup work.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First half feels a little rushed and sonically thin, but the second half builds momentum with hot renditions and an extended jam that keeps the energy high.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar intro to Uncle John's Band highlighted as a sweet moment; overall guitar work praised.
